Video.summary: A stray dog loyal to Bill Gentry is the only witness in the murder of Susan Sayres's father.
Video.title: The Third Passenger

Video.summary: Stagecoach driver Abe Williamson hunts down two outlaws who robbed his stagecoach.
Video.title: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Image.alt: The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon
The Treasure of Elk Creek Canyon

Video.summary: In Totem, Idaho, Dorsey Bilger has told one tall tale too many.
Video.title: A Sponge Full of Vinegar

Video.summary: An unarmed Navajo sets out to avenge the murder and robbery of a Native elder.
Video.title: Experiment in Fear

Video.summary: A dramatization of the life of hat manufacturer John Stetson.
Video.title: The Hat That Wore the West

Image.alt: The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West
The Hat That Wore the West

Video.summary: A town boss makes trouble for a farmer.
Video.title: The Last Shot

Video.summary: A horticulturist heads out West to identify new plants and encounters challenges along the way.
Video.title: The Grass Man

Video.summary: Crew chief Yank Van Duzen walks off a mining job in protest when the foremen ignore warnings.
Video.title: Grotto of Death

Video.summary: An inventor without enough animals to drive his wagon decides to build a sail to do the job.
Video.title: Thar She Blows

Video.summary: Peaceful Jack Slade changes into a vengeful gunman after he's attacked by a thief.
Video.title: The Man Who Died Twice

Video.summary: Hunting a large, mysterious creature.
Video.title: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Image.alt: The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek
The Red Ghost of Eagle Creek

Video.summary: In 1862 Utah, the employees of a stagecoach depot encounter an orphaned Native boy.
Video.title: Little Cayuse

Video.summary: Winfield Stratton finds gold just after selling his mining claim to a syndicate.
Video.title: Sixty-Seven Miles of Gold

Video.summary: Patrick Manogue is challenged by a gambler as he tries to bring morality to Virginia City, Nev.
Video.title: The Westside of Heaven

Video.summary: John Wheeler is going to even the odds in a fight between meek Arkie Monson and a gunslinger.
Video.title: The Bigger They Are

Video.summary: Lt. Robert Benson becomes torn when the woman he loves asks him for secret government information.
Video.title: Matter of Honor

Video.summary: Jeremy is a crew member on a blackbirding ship that inhumanely captures and enslaves native peoples.
Video.title: Showdown at Kamaaina Flats

Video.summary: A 15-year-old joins the Texas revolutionaries to avenge Davy Crockett's death at the Alamo.
Video.title: Davy's Friend

Video.summary: A charlatan rainmaker sparks a range war.
Video.title: Big John and the Rainmaker

Video.summary: A pioneer fends off a trapper's persistent offers to buy the pioneer's Indian wife.
Video.title: From the Earth, a Heritage

Video.summary: California's governor hires a photographer to help him win a bet about the way horses gallop.
Video.title: The $25,000 Wager

Video.summary: A bear hunter and his daughters nurse an injured Easterner back to health.
Video.title: Peter the Hunter

Video.summary: Native brothers must find a tribal renegade.
Video.title: Death in the Desert

Video.summary: Angered by increasing federal mining taxes, the citizens vote to secede from the U.S.
Video.title: Birthright

Video.summary: The appointed warden of a Nevada prison tries to apprehend three notorious escaped convicts.
Video.title: Temporary Warden

Video.summary: A Native woman plans revenge after her husband is killed by thieves.
Video.title: The Captain Dick Mine

Video.summary: An Army officer helps a young man track down his sister, who was captured by Natives years before.
Video.title: The Lawless Have Laws

Video.summary: A crew of mine developers ingeniously races against time to make it from Arizona to San Diego.
Video.title: A City Is Born

Video.summary: A woman whose house is hit by a meteorite decides to sue God for damages.
Video.title: Canary Harris vs. the Almighty

Video.summary: The story of a bank clerk who became a heavyweight boxing champion.
Video.title: The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot

Image.alt: The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot
The Fight San Francisco Never Forgot

Video.summary: A grizzled trail guide is retained to lead a dangerous trek through Native country.
Video.title: Hugh Glass Meets the Bear

Video.summary: The mayor of Deadwood comes up with a manufactured hero to lure tourists into his dying town.
Video.title: The Resurrection of Deadwood Dick

Video.summary: Ignoring his brother's warnings, young Roy Bean gets involved in a rivalry over a pretty girl.
Video.title: Sense of Justice

Video.summary: Robert Louis Stevenson is exploring a deserted mine with his son.
Video.title: The Jolly Roger and Wells Fargo

Video.summary: A woman's loyalties are tested when her lawman boyfriend must arrest her outlaw brother.
Video.title: The Day They Stole the Salamander

The Day They Stole the Salamander

The Day They Stole the Salamander

Video.summary: In the new state of New Mexico, a young woman decides to challenge the servitude system in court.
Video.title: Along Came Mariana

Video.summary: A recent widower wants a headstone.
Video.title: The Lone Grave

Video.summary: Two outlaws devise a mining operation and finance it with stolen bullion.
Video.title: How to Beat a Badman

Video.summary: Mormons must save the life of a dying man or face the wrath of his tribe.
Video.title: A Key for the Fort

Video.summary: A physician courts disaster by aiding one of two feuding Natives.
Video.title: The Lady Doctor

Video.summary: Inspector Wesley Hull is determined to discover how postmaster Jack Reardon can sell so many stamps.
Video.title: The Biggest Little Post Office in the World

Video.summary: A woman finds a family heirloom in the possession of a junk collector who demands payment for it.
Video.title: A Bargain Is for Keeping

Video.summary: Two members of a wagon train try to reach help before their group dies of starvation.
Video.title: Out of the Valley of Death

Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death

Video.summary: Tiger Lil tries to leave her dance hall days behind her, but Frank Johnson won't give up on her.
Video.title: Lady with a Past

Video.summary: This tale of misadventure focuses on Frank Baum's penning of The Wonderful Wizard of Oz.
Video.title: The Wizard of Aberdeen

Video.summary: A sheriff in Tucson pursues bank robbers and $62,000 in cash, which has been hidden.
Video.title: Up the Chimney
